Random.java

00037 
00038 package java.util;
00039 
00071 public class Random
00072 {
00079     private long seed;
00080 
00088     public Random()
00089     {
00090         this(System.currentTimeMillis());
00091     }
00092 
00099     public Random(long seed)
00100     {
00101         setSeed(seed);
00102     }
00103 
00118     public synchronized void setSeed(long seed)
00119     {
00120         this.seed = (seed ^ 0x5DEECE66DL) & ((1L << 48) - 1);
00121     }
00122 
00138     protected synchronized int next(int bits)
00139     {
00140         seed = (seed * 0x5DEECE66DL + 0xBL) & ((1L << 48) - 1);
00141         return (int) (seed >>> (48 - bits));
00142     }
00143 
00157     public int nextInt()
00158     {
00159         return next(32);
00160     }
00161 
00208     public int nextInt(int n)
00209     {
00210         if (n <= 0)
00211             throw new IllegalArgumentException("n must be positive");
00212     
00213         if ((n & -n) == n) // i.e., n is a power of 2
00214             return (int) ((n * (long) next(31)) >> 31);
00215     
00216         int bits, val;
00217         do
00218         {
00219             bits = next(31);
00220             val = bits % n;
00221         }
00222         while (bits - val + (n - 1) < 0);
00223 
00224         return val;
00225     }
00226 
00239     public long nextLong()
00240     {
00241         return ((long) next(32) << 32) + next(32);
00242     }
00243 
00256     public float nextFloat()
00257     {
00258         return next(24) / (float) (1 << 24);
00259     }
00260 
00273     public double nextDouble()
00274     {
00275         return (((long) next(26) << 27) + next(27)) / (double) (1L << 53);
00276     }
00277 }
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:25:24 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
